elements.text: On vacation you are touring a cave, and you feel nervous about being in such an enclosed space. As you move forward, you're finding it hard to catch your breath. You try to focus on your surroundings, and know that the feeling will end...

elements.name: exploring_a_narrow_cave--physical_health--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
